based_on: spinner/rust/crates/da-api/src/genome_encoder.rs (GenomeEntry + ProtoPayload), spinner/protocols.xml (mayan_swift), Mayan Swift EVM canonical deployment
intended_use: taifoon-solver estimateGas pipeline integration tests — NOT a real captured event
realistic_fields: contract (Mayan Swift EVM canonical 0xC38d8a07D4d9E8BC1D32dF50D4b1eAEEbeAfdC1f — same on all EVM chains supported by Swift)
src_chain=137 (Polygon), dst_chain=8453 (Base) — both Wormhole-connected EVM chains
auction_mode=2 (English auction, the default Swift mode)
